scratch.buffer:
; Scratch buffer for live sequencer scripting.
; C-x C-e eval s-expression at cursor
; C-x C-b eval whole buffer
; C-q quit scratch
; Examples:
;   (seq-track-steps)
;   (for-each |n| (seq-toggle-step n) (list 1 5 9 13))
;   (every :bar 2 '(seq-toggle-step 1))
;   (clear-hooks)

(seq-track-steps)

(def fuck (y) 
  (let ((x (rand-int y)))
    (range x (+ x y))
  ))

(every :beat 2 |x| (for-each (lambda (y) (seq-toggle-step y)) (fuck 8)))
(clear-hooks)

(def timbo () (if (< (rand-int 16) 8) :4t :32))
(every :beat 3 |x| (for-each |y| (seq-plock-timebase y (timbo)) (fuck 4)) )
